REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IN SUPPORT OF DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT FOR FORECLOSURE, SPECIFIC PERFORMANCE, APPOINTMENT OF RECEIVER AND INJUNCTIVE RELIEF (TRANSACTION ID # 60133131) FILED BY DEFENDANT KWONG, JEANNE AS SUCCESSOR TRUSTEE OF THE STAN KWONG TRUST
MINI MINUTES FOR MAR-02-2017 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 501

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT JEANNE KWONG'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT FOR FORECLOSURE, SPECIFIC PERFORMANCE, APPOINTMENT OF RECEIVER AND INJUNCTIVE RELIEF IS OVERRULED, 10 DAYS TO ANSWER. THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS ARGUMENTS DO NOT APPLY BECAUSE THE ENCUMBERED PROPERTY WAS TRANSFERRED BEFORE DECEDENT'S DEATH, AND THUS, WAS NOT PART OF THE ESTATE AND/OR NOT AVAILABLE TO THE CLAIMANTS OF THE ESTATE. ADDITIONALLY, THE PROBATE COURT HELD ON JUNE 13, 2016 THAT "PETITION FOR ORDER DETERMINING OWNERSHIP AND INVALIDITY OF THE DISPUTED DEED OF TRUST" WAS NOT AN APPROPRIATE PROBATE MATTER. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED (D501)

Notice Of Hearing On Demurrer And Demurrer To Complaint For Foreclosure, Specific Performance, Appointment Of Receiver And Injunctive Relief
Off Calendar Mar-02-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT JEANNE KWONG's Demurrer To Complaint For Foreclosure, Specific Performance, Appointment Of Receiver And Injunctive Relief is OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. The statute of limitations arguments do not apply because the encumbered property was transferred before decedent's death, and thus, was not part of the estate and/or not available to the claimants of the estate. Additionally, the Probate Court held on June 13, 2016 that "Petition for Order Determining Ownership and Invalidity of the Disputed Deed of Trust" was not an appropriate probate matter. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported (D501)
